/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-ar qc libdynamixel.a  CMakeFiles/dynamixel.dir/group_bulk_read.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamixel.dir/group_bulk_write.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamixel.dir/group_sync_read.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamixel.dir/group_sync_write.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamixel.dir/packet_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamixel.dir/port_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamixel.dir/port_handler_linux.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamixel.dir/protocol1_packet_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dynamixel.dir/protocol2_packet_handler.cpp.o
/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-ranlib libdynamixel.a
